description: Mid-stage DeFi yield protocol — standard test case

input.target_audience_raw: DeFi farmers aged 25-40, technically fluent, yield-focused, skeptical of empty promises. They've been rugged before and value transparency and audits.
input.differentiators: Delta-neutral yield strategy averaging 14.2% APY. Audited by Certik and Trail of Bits. No lockups — withdraw anytime. $48M TVL with zero exploits.
input.extra_context: Competing against Pendle and Convex. Our edge is simplicity — one click to deploy, no veTokenomics complexity.

input.target_audience_raw: Ethereum developers tired of high gas fees. Building dApps, NFT projects, or DeFi protocols on mainnet. Looking for EVM-compatible, fast, cheap.
input.differentiators: Full EVM equivalence. 50ms block times. Gas fees under $0.001. Native account abstraction. Backed by Paradigm and a16z.
input.extra_context: Mainnet launches in 3 weeks. Testnet has 180k wallets. Need to convert testnet users to mainnet early adopters.
